title: 皐月賞の後に・挑戦は終わらない！

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I know, right? I ran with everything I had!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I really gave it my all, but... I didn't get first.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I guess this means I'll never be a Triple Crown
champion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She may not be able to claim the same title that
Rudolf once did, but...
choice_data_list: You can still surpass Rudolf, you know.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's right! My dream isn't over!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll train my heart out so I never lose ever again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio is strong in both body and soul.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Per her wishes, we continue training the very next
day.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's get this training started! I gotta give it
my all if I'm gonna win the other Triple Crown
races!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And I know where to start—I wanna do some more
of that partner running!
choice_data_list:
Right after your race? Are you sure you're up to
it?

Right after your race? Are you sure you're up to
it?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmph! You're being too easy on me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
If there's one thing I learned from the Satsuki
Sho, it's that these Classic races are no joke!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: And you know what race is next up, don't you?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yep! The Derby is every runner's dream race!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All my opponents are gonna be bringing their
A-game, which means I gotta do the same!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So I need to start running pronto!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Without a moment to lose, Teio dashes off to find
her next training partner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no time to rest. Our training for the
Japanese Derby begins at once.
